code: import api,{firstSuccess}from'./api';export const productService={getAllProducts:async()=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.get('/api/products'),()=>api.get('/products')])).data,getProductById:async id=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.get("/api/products/".concat(id)),()=>api.get("/products/".concat(id))])).data,createProduct:async product=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.post('/api/products',product),()=>api.post('/products',product)])).data,updateProduct:async(id,product)=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.put("/api/products/".concat(id),product),()=>api.put("/products/".concat(id),product)])).data,deleteProduct:async id=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.delete("/api/products/".concat(id)),()=>api.delete("/products/".concat(id))])).data,searchByName:async name=>{const encoded=encodeURIComponent(name);return(await firstSuccess([()=>api.get("/api/products/search/".concat(encoded)),()=>api.get("/api/products/search?name=".concat(encoded)),()=>api.get("/products/search/".concat(encoded))])).data;}};
